CustomField.description:
This field has dual usage:
Supplement Rent Record Operations:
Updated or created during Supplement Rent record operations: 1.1 If {EngineTemplateID} doesn't match {CurEngTempID}, update this field. 1.2 Create Supplement Rent Event Requirement records, populating "{EngineTemplateID}(Y_Hidden_EngineTemplateID__c)" with this field's value. Button Utilization:
Utilized via buttons: 2.1 Push to Lease Button (Maintenance Event Task Object): - During Supplement Rent Event Requirement creation, update this field with Engine Template Id for data synchronization with MPE template on the supplement record. 2.2 Delete Maintenance Event Task (Backend Code): - When deleting a Maintenance Event Task, set this field value to blank on associated supplement rent records. 2.3 Refresh Tasks Button (Supplemental Rent Event Requirement Object): - When refreshing tasks, recreate Supplement Rent Event Requirement records, updating this field value with MPE's Engine Template Id."
CustomField.label: _EngineTemplateID
